question: What two distinct abilities do Celestian 'Star-Singers' possess?

answers.original: Star-Singers weave Harmony-Threads from cosmic vibrations and use Echo-Calls to communicate across vast distances.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer that question.

ops.description: War Golems are powered by Animus Cores, which allow them limited function.<SEP>War Golems are powered by Animus Cores, which allow them limited function.
The Power Cell of the Pathfinder Helm provides up to 72 Xylotian hours of continuous operation.

entities.name: Celestian
entities.description: Celestian are beings known for their musical abilities and cosmic connections.

entities.name: Grand Celestian Chorus
entities.description: The Grand Celestian Chorus is a performance that occurs once per century.

entities.name: Star-Singers
entities.description: Star-Singers are a subset of Celestian known for weaving Harmony-Threads and performing Echo-Calls.

entities.name: Celestian Conservatory
entities.description: The Celestian Conservatory is an institution that teaches advanced musical theory.

relations.description: The Star-Opera House is a wonder of Celestian architecture.
Star-Singers participate in the Grand Celestian Chorus, which performs once per century.
The Celestian Conservatory teaches advanced musical theory to Star-Singers.
Star-Singers weave Harmony-Threads from cosmic vibrations.
Star-Singers use Echo-Calls to communicate across vast distances.
